title: Custom eggless birthday cakes for Box Hill and Rouse Hill families
summary:
Growing families in Box Hill and Rouse Hill keep looking for a custom cake that has genuinely no eggs in it — not as a dietary option, but as the default.

That is precisely what our Riverstone store carries. Every cake we sell is 100% eggless. Not some of them. Every single one.

Six sizes from 6-inch up to 16-inch. Fifteen flavours including Rasmalai and Mango. Buttercream, fondant, or ganache. Any design — send us a photo reference via WhatsApp and we recreate it.

48 hours minimum notice. That is what fresh baking takes. Pickup from Riverstone Shopping Centre. Free parking on site. We open at 6am weekdays.

WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725.
keywords: Box Hill Rouse Hill eggless bakery
no eggs custom cake North West Sydney
